canonical_definition: ResumeBench-Mix, a combined real-synthetic dataset created by pairing public real resumes with an equal number of synthetic resumes in five languages for evaluation.
papers: Can Large Language Models Outperform Non-Experts in Poetry Evaluation? A Comparative Study Using the Consensual Assessment Technique
